result.stdout:
Usage: [command] [-h|--help] [--version]

Commands:
  api     Generates the API interface project code based on the definition in <paramref name="ymlDirPath"/>
  dnsk    Clones the dnsk repo in <paramref name="reposPath"/> directory to <paramref name="key"/>
  i18n    Generates the i18n code based on the csv languages file

Usage: [command] [-h|--help] [--version]

Commands:
  api     Generates the API interface project code based on the definition in <paramref name="ymlDirPath"/>
  dnsk    Clones the dnsk repo in <paramref name="reposPath"/> directory to <paramref name="key"/>
  i18n    Generates the i18n code based on the csv languages file

result.stdout:
Usage: api [arguments...] [-h|--help] [--version]

Generates the API interface project code based on the definition in <paramref name="ymlDirPath"/>

Arguments:
  [0] <string>    The path to the directory containing the api.yml file

result.stdout:
Usage: dnsk [arguments...] [-h|--help] [--version]

Clones the dnsk repo in <paramref name="reposPath"/> directory to <paramref name="key"/>

Arguments:
  [0] <string>    The path to the parent directory where code repos are stored
  [1] <Key>       The Key of the new repo

commands.payload:
Usage: dnsk [arguments...] [-h|--help] [--version]

Clones the dnsk repo in <paramref name="reposPath"/> directory to <paramref name="key"/>

Arguments:
  [0] <string>    The path to the parent directory where code repos are stored
  [1] <Key>       The Key of the new repo

result.stdout:
Usage: i18n [arguments...] [-h|--help] [--version]

Generates the i18n code based on the csv languages file

Arguments:
  [0] <string>    The path to the csv parent directory
  [1] <string>    The namespace to use in the generated code
  [2] <bool>      Specifies if the generated Dictionaries should be IReadOnly interfaces
  [3] <string>    A common prefix to use on all the generated keys

commands.payload:
Usage: i18n [arguments...] [-h|--help] [--version]

Generates the i18n code based on the csv languages file

Arguments:
  [0] <string>    The path to the csv parent directory
  [1] <string>    The namespace to use in the generated code
  [2] <bool>      Specifies if the generated Dictionaries should be IReadOnly interfaces
  [3] <string>    A common prefix to use on all the generated keys
